subcodes.first_line: The perspicacious soul hath ever been moved to shame and contrition, inasmuch as he describeth Him Who is the Purpose of all existence [3.5s]... ...Say:  O concourse of Persian divines In My name ye have seized the reins of men, and occupy the seats of honor, by reason of your relation to Me
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان بصیر لازال منفعل و خجل چه که وصف مینماید مقصودیرا که جمیع ارکان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @petitions to authorities, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement
